issues.issue: Intrusive CSS code block disrupts narrative onset.
Shifts between formal butler voice and vulgar slang, breaking voice consistency.
Repeated use of “stands as it did”/“stands as we left it, Sir” creates monotony.
Abrupt transitions among unrelated topics without linking transitions.
Overly long, convoluted sentences impede logical progression.
Frequent em‑dashes and parenthetical asides fragment the flow.
Embedded Talk of the Town excerpt inserted without clear segue or framing.
Contradictory closings confuse the narrative closure.
Repeated expletives undermine the cultivated butler register.
No overarching theme; reads as a disconnected list.
